label: Iran Killed
source: Al Jazeera / HRANA / Hengaw / Iran Health Ministry
contestNote: Iran Health Ministry (official floor): 1,444+ killed, 18,551+ injured. HRANA NGO: 2,800+ incl. 181+ children. Hengaw: 4,300+ total in first 10 days. Iran UN ambassador: ~10,000 civilian sites hit. Pentagon denies targeting civilian infrastructure. 3.2M Iranians displaced per UNHCR. Internet blackout (~1% connectivity / 305+ hrs) severely limits verification. Iranian Red Crescent clinic damaged Mar 17.

label: US Killed
deltaNote: 13 KIA confirmed: 6 Army Reserve killed in Kuwait drone strike (Feb 28), Sgt. Benjamin N. Pennington (died Mar 8 from wounds), 6 KC-135 crew (names released by Pentagon — crash Mar 13 western Iraq, cause under investigation). ~140 wounded total.

label: Israel Killed
deltaNote: 15 killed in Israel total. Iran 6th wave (Mar 15) targeting Tel Nof AB, Israeli Military HQ, Tel Aviv defense complex — sirens across central Israel, cluster fragments hit Tel Aviv streets, minor casualties. 2,000+ Israelis wounded total.

label: Gulf Region Killed
deltaNote: Mar 17: Abu Dhabi missile killed 1 Palestinian civilian. Dubai airport fuel tank drone strike (no direct casualties). Kuwait US Embassy missile strike (no US fatalities). Saudi Arabia intercepted 37 drones. 16+ vessels struck in Persian Gulf total across conflict.

label: Lebanon Killed
source: Lebanese health authorities / Lebanon Information Ministry
deltaNote: 850 killed including 107 children and 66 women; 32 health workers killed. 2,100+ injured. 800,000+ displaced. Separate Israel-Lebanon ceasefire track forming (France involved, Ron Dermer leading for Israel). Lebanese PM Nawaf Salam supportive but Hezbollah has not responded.

label: Brent Crude
deltaNote: Holding near $105–106/bbl amid Dubai airport strike shock. Trump actively weighing additional Kharg Island strikes. Iran warns '$200/bbl.' IEA 400M barrel release partially absorbed. Dubai airport drone attack rattled Gulf energy confidence. Qatar LNG force majeure risk flagged.

label: Flights Cancelled
deltaNote: Emirates airline temporarily suspended all flights Mar 17 after drone struck Dubai airport fuel tank. ~500 oil tankers stranded in Persian Gulf. Hormuz traffic near-zero, Day 18. Cape of Good Hope rerouting increasing.

label: Countries Affected
deltaNote: Iran, Israel, Lebanon, UAE, Bahrain, Kuwait, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, Oman, Iraq, Jordan, Azerbaijan, Turkey, Cyprus, France. Day 18: Dubai airport drone strike; Abu Dhabi civilian killed; Kuwait US Embassy struck; EU votes against expanding naval ops; Turkey FM Fidan leading ceasefire push.
